headline: Can Baker Hughes Keep Its Winning Streak Alive in Q2 Earnings?
summary: BKR enters Q2 with an earnings-beat streak, rising estimates and oil-price support, despite expected year-over-year declines.

raw.headline: Can Baker Hughes Keep Its Winning Streak Alive in Q2 Earnings?

headline: FTAI Aviation Jumps On $1.5 Billion Deal For New Power Unit
summary: FTAI Aviation stock jumped 5.5% when its unit that turns unused jet engines into gas-powered turbines signed a deal with an unnamed "international cloud service provider."

raw.headline: FTAI Aviation Jumps On $1.5 Billion Deal For New Power Unit
